hero.title: Grow your community<br class="hidden xs:inline"> with a custom app.
hero.subtitle:
More value for your followers, new revenue for you.
We design and build the web or mobile app that extends your content.

case_study.title: Maison AWL — 180k followers, 10,000 users.
case_study.subtitle: We helped Maison AWL design and build their platform. Result: 10,000 active users directly from their community.
case_study.quote: A creator's strength is their distribution. We turn that audience into users of a real product.
case_study.author: Mohamed Chettah

pitch.title: Your audience is your greatest asset.

blocks.title: Distribution is everything.
blocks.text: Today anyone can build a standard web or mobile app. But what makes the difference — and always will — is distribution. You have a targeted audience, in a specific niche, that knows and trusts you.

blocks.title: Your revenue is limited to your content.
blocks.text: Sponsorships, affiliates, brand deals… It's good, but it's capped. And those revenues depend on platforms you don't control. It's time to build something that's yours.

blocks.title: We build the app that changes everything.
blocks.text: We design and develop a web or mobile app to add new value to your profile, offer more to your community, and generate a new revenue stream — recurring, scalable, and yours.

services.title: Our Process
services.subtitle: From idea to launch — we handle everything, you stay focused on your content.

business.title: Business & Market Research
business.description: We validate the idea with you: market research, feasibility, positioning. We go beyond a simple survey — active prospecting for real feedback, forms on your social media, competitor analysis.

design.title: Design
design.description: We create the visual identity of your app and design every screen to deliver the best experience for your users.

development.title: Development
development.description: We code your custom app — frontend, backend, infrastructure. Everything is built to be solid, performant and scalable.

launch.title: Launch & Go Live
launch.description: We deploy your app to production. Everything is ready to welcome your first users. Distribution? We advise, but you have the firepower.

services.distribution_note: Distribution is your superpower — we provide guidance, but your audience does the rest.

process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: A simple 3-step approach to turn your audience into users.

1.title: 1. Discovery Call
1.description: We discuss your audience, your niche, and the app idea. We propose the best strategy to turn your followers into users.

2.title: 2. Proposal & Scoping
2.description: You receive a detailed proposal with scope, budget, and timeline. Market research, design, development, launch — everything is included.

3.title: 3. We Build Your App
3.description: The project starts. Design, development, testing — you follow progress in real time. At the end, your app is live, ready to welcome your community.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions for creators:
faq.contact_text: More questions? Contact me directly here:

0.question: I'm a content creator, is this for me?
0.answer: Yes, if you have an engaged audience (even modest) and want to go beyond content: offer a tool, platform, or digital service to your community. We work with creators on Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn, Twitch, and other niches.

1.question: How much does it cost to build an app?
1.answer: The budget depends on the scope: simple web app, full mobile app, number of features. After a first call, we provide a clear, transparent budget — no surprises. We also adapt to different ambition levels (MVP vs. full product).

2.question: I don't have a precise idea, can you help?
2.answer: Absolutely. We always start with a discovery call to understand your audience, niche, and goals. We then propose concrete ideas based on what works in the creator economy. Market research is included in our process.

3.question: Do you also handle distribution?
3.answer: We advise on launch strategy (teasing, forms, early access…) but distribution is your superpower. You have the audience — we give you the app. It's this combination that makes the difference.

4.question: How long does it take?
4.answer: On average 4 to 10 weeks depending on project complexity. An MVP can be ready in 3-4 weeks, a more complete product in 8-10 weeks. It all depends on the number of features and desired level of polish.

5.question: Have other creators done this?
5.answer: Yes! We worked with Maison AWL (180k followers): 10,000 users on the platform. And it's a strong trend — more and more creators are developing their own app to diversify revenue and offer more value to their community.
